word: G5112 - τολμηρότερον - tolmēróteron - tol-may-rot'-er-on - The more boldly

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: The more boldly
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adjective / பெயரடை
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Neuter of the compound of a derivative of the bse of G5111 (as adverb); more daringly, that is, with greater confidence than otherwise: - the more boldly.
